summary: Typecheck has 254+ pre-existing errors across campaign/, plugin/, test/ unrelated to tool-telemetry
detail: When running bun typecheck in packages/opencode, 254+ type errors fire from: campaign/auditor.ts (EventName enum comparison), campaign/projector.ts (redeclared exports, DatabaseError assignability), campaign/binder.ts, campaign/integrator.ts, test/campaign/truth-closure.test.ts, test/plugin/capability-proxy-bisect.test.ts (missing exports), test/tool/registry.test.ts (21 arguments/pipe error), test/server/httpapi-exercise/runtime.ts (missing tui-control module). None originate from tool.ts or analytics.ts.
